_comment: Databricks Jobs API 2.1 — multi-task job definition.
Register once with: databricks jobs create --json @jobs/pipeline_job.json
Databricks Free Edition is serverless-only. Tasks below have no cluster field —
no existing_cluster_id, no new_cluster — and that absence is what makes them run
on serverless compute. Do not add a cluster field on Free Edition.
name: financial-analytics-pipeline

tasks.description: Ingest raw S&P 500, Euro Stoxx 50, VIX, US Fed Rate, ECB Rate from data/raw CSVs
Clean, join, forward-fill rates, compute log returns and policy differential
Rolling volatility, correlations, drawdown, regime classifications

_classic_compute_example._note: This job runs on serverless compute — no cluster field on any task above. For a full Databricks workspace using classic compute instead, add job_clusters with a new_cluster block like the one below, and reference it per task via job_cluster_key.
